posts.hook: Apple just took OpenAI to court
posts.caption: apple sues openai, a cisa contractor leaks govcloud creds on github, and cursor ships side chats. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: Apple sues OpenAI over trade secret theft
slides.desc: Tang Tan and Chang Liu named; Apple claims ==400+ ex-Apple employees== now work at OpenAI

slides.title: A CISA contractor left 844MB of DHS data on a public GitHub repo
slides.desc: GovCloud admin creds, plaintext passwords and SSH keys, up for ==six months==

terms.gloss: the US government's civilian cyber-defense agency
amazon's isolated cloud for US government workloads

slides.title: OpenAI's biosafety bug bounty goes permanent
slides.desc: top reward doubled to $50,000, biosafety testing is now a standing program, not a one-off

slides.title: Cursor 3.11 ships side chats
slides.desc: durable parallel chats that inherit context from the main agent run, no pausing

posts.hook: OpenAI claims a proof for a 50-year-old math conjecture, even OpenAI says wait for review
posts.caption: openai claims a proof for a 50-year-old math conjecture and says it needs weeks of review, its safety chief exits as the team folds into research, and nyt finds boko haram members querying ai chatbots for weapons help. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: OpenAI claims a proof of the 50-year-old Cycle Double Cover Conjecture
slides.desc: 64 subagents, under an hour, ==not yet peer-reviewed==: OpenAI says it needs weeks of scrutiny

slides.title: OpenAI's safety chief exits as the team folds into research
slides.desc: Heidecke leaves, Mia Glaese becomes VP of research and safety, Brockman keeps products

slides.title: NYT: Boko Haram members are querying AI chatbots for weapons help
slides.desc: 27 ex-members interviewed; disguised intent got them past chatbot safety filters

slides.title: SK Hynix warns 2027 will be memory's ==worst-ever supply year==
slides.desc: warning lands two days after its record Nasdaq debut, demand now outstrips output past 2030

slides.title: China recovered a rocket booster at sea using a net, not a landing burn
slides.desc: first net-based reusable-rocket recovery; carries up to 16,000kg to low Earth orbit
